text:
My hardware:
CPU: Intel Q6600 2.4Ghz quad core
GRAPHICS CARD: 88OO GTX , GDDR3, 768MB
RAM: 2 GIGA, DDR3
Is possible to do not edit a Full HD video? I use Toshiba Camileo s10 camera and I want to make my new skate movie. Videos are on HD. But when I import clip, video and audio too are going so slow :(
AGP and nvidia driver work just fine and I can see the same video on vlc & mplayer without any problem!!!!
If is something wrong with Kdenlive please fix it. I think my hardware can edit an HD video!
